sections.paragraph:
pr.n. (“collector”), Asaph.-

(1) a Levite, chief of the singers appointed by David, 1Ch 16:5, who is celebrated in a later age as a poet and prophet ( 2Ch 29:30), to whom the twelve psalms 50 -7383 are ascribed in their titles, and whose descendants (בְּנֵי אָסָף), even in the time of Ezra and Nehemiah, are mentioned as having occupied themselves with sacred verse and song ( 1Ch 25:1 2Ch 20:14 29:13 Ezr 2:41 3:10 Neh 7:44 11:22 ).-(2) 2Ki 18:18 Isa 36:3.-(3) Neh 2:8.
